message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.fabs + numpy.negative passthrough wrappers (br-franken_numpy-29r9, br-franken_numpy-82ch)

Expose fnp_python.fabs delegating to numpy.fabs(x) (real-only absolute
value; rejects complex) and fnp_python.negative delegating to numpy.negative(x)
(dtype-preserving unary minus).

fabs parity oracle covers:
- negative/zero/positive scalar floats
- signed-zero fabs(-0.0) == +0.0
- 1-D mixed-sign array and 2-D element-wise
- integer input dtype promotion to float
- complex input TypeError surface parity

negative parity oracle covers:
- negative/zero/positive scalar floats
- 1-D float and 2-D arrays
- integer input dtype preservation (int stays int)
- complex input component-wise negation
- double-negation identity round-trip
